name: Caddy Storage Case - Mondo Llama™
description:
Organize your essentials neatly with this Caddy Storage Case from Mondo Llama™. Made of 100% post-consumer recycled plastic, this storage case features a large compartment to hold your magazines, paintbrushes, mini toys and other two small compartments for pencils, pens, paint bottles, stickers, and much more. Plus, this utility case boast a top handle with grip for easy portability. Declutter your space with this caddy storage case .

Mondo Llama™: Find your creativity in the making.
